## Skills
<!-- Skill name, e.g., km-digitizer or group-sequential-design -->

## Query
<!-- The exact user prompt to test — paste it as you would type it to Claude -->

## Expected Output
<!-- Human-readable description of what a correct response should contain -->

## Attached Files / Input Context (Optional)
<!-- URLs to input files (images, PDFs, etc.) or paste small inputs directly -->

## Rubric Criteria (Assertions)
<!-- One testable, objective assertion per line. Each should be verifiable by inspecting output files. -->
<!-- Example: digitized_data.csv exists and contains at least 20 rows -->
<!-- Example: km_report.docx exists -->
<!-- Example: median survival for Arm A is between 10 and 14 months -->
